description_long: This rifle features a sleek, modern design with a predominantly black finish accented by colored highlights and metallic components. The body is constructed with a combination of metal and polymer, giving it a robust yet lightweight appearance. It is equipped with a fixed stock and a prominent scope mounted on the top rail, suggesting precision targeting capabilities. The barrel is long and appears reinforced, with a complex muzzle device at the end, likely a muzzle brake or compensator. The magazine is a detachable box type, partially visible beneath the receiver. The overall build and detailing indicate a high-tech, tactical firearm suitable for urban operations.
description: A modern, black tactical rifle with a fixed stock, scope, long reinforced barrel, and detachable box magazine, featuring colored highlights and a complex muzzle device.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle device and the narrow profile of the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, including the fixed stock, scope, and magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock and the alignment of the scope with the barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional details of the receiver, magazine, and colored highlights.
